basic_details.job_title: MRPL Fire Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for UR candidates. Maximum Age Limit: 53 years for OBC candidates. Age Relaxation: 5 years for Persons with Benchmarked Disabilities (PwBD).

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in engineering in Fire/ Fire and Safety
qualification.details: Fire Officer: Bachelor's degree in engineering in Fire/ Fire and Safety with a minimum aggregate of 60% marks from a recognized Indian University. Experience: Minimum 5 years of post-qualification work experience in the field of Fire / Fire and Safety in Oil and Gas OR Petrochemicals OR Fertilizer Industry.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹13 Lakh per annum to ₹14 Lakh per annum
salary_details.details: ₹13 Lakh per annum (for number of years of relevant work experience above 5 years upto 6 years) ₹14 Lakh per annum (If level of relevant experience is more than 6 years)

selection_process: Screening of applications Written (screening) test (if applicable) Personal Interview (PI) only
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MRPL Fire Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MRPL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download MRPL Fire Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MRPL Fire Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application for the MRPL Fire Officer recruitment is 16th July 2026. Candidates are advised to complete their application process before this deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Fire Officer post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Bachelor's degree in engineering in Fire/ Fire and Safety with a minimum aggregate of 60% marks from a recognized Indian University. Relevant work experience is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Fire Officer position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Fire Officer post in Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Limited (MRPL) as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Fire Officer role?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from ₹13 Lakh per annum for candidates with 5-6 years of experience to ₹14 Lakh per annum for those with more than 6 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to the Fire Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for UR candidates is 50 years, and for OBC candidates, it is 53 years. There is also an age relaxation of 5 years for Persons with Benchmarked Disabilities (PwBD).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for MRPL Fire Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: For General, OBC, and EWS categories, the application fee is ₹118/-. Candidates belonging to SC, ST, PwBD, and Ex-Serviceman categories are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Fire Officer position at MRPL?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a screening of applications, followed by a written (screening) test if deemed necessary, and a Personal Interview (PI) for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any work experience required for the Fire Officer post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 5 years of post-qualification work experience in the field of Fire / Fire and Safety within the Oil and Gas, Petrochemicals, or Fertilizer industry is required.

faq.question: Q9. In which mode can candidates apply for the MRPL Fire Officer jobs?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for the MRPL Fire Officer jobs only through the online mode. The application link will be available on the official MRPL careers website during the application period.

faq.question: Q10. Where is MRPL located?
faq.answer: Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Limited (MRPL) is located in Mangalore, Karnataka, with the pincode 575030. The recruitment is for positions based in this location.
